Class StandingOrderCashaccount

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafiosch.entities.TenantBaseID
grafioschtrader.entities.StandingOrder
grafioschtrader.entities.StandingOrderCashaccount
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Entity public class StandingOrderCashaccount extends StandingOrder
Concrete standing order subclass for cash-account transactions (WITHDRAWAL and DEPOSIT). Stores the fixed cash amount that is debited or credited on each execution. Maps to the standing_order_cashaccount join table in the JOINED inheritance hierarchy.
See Also:
